hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';const blocked=[/rm\s+-rf\s+\/(?!tmp)/,/DROP\s+DATABASE/i,/chmod\s+-R\s+777/,/curl.*\|\s*(bash|sh)/,/>(\s*)\/etc\//];for(const p of blocked){if(p.test(cmd)){process.stderr.write('[BLOCKED] Dangerous: '+cmd+'\n');process.exit(2)}}console.log(d)}catch(e){console.log(d)}})"

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';if(/git push/.test(cmd)){process.stderr.write('[Hook] Review before push: pnpm test && pnpm lint\n')}}catch{}console.log(d)})"

hooks.description: Block writes to .env and lock files

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const f=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(/\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$/.test(f)){const{execSync}=require('child_process');try{const o=execSync('grep -n "console\\.log" '+f,{encoding:'utf8',timeout:5000});if(o.trim())process.stderr.write('[Hook] console.log in '+f+' — remove before commit\n')}catch{}}}catch{}console.log(d)})"

hooks.description: Show git changes on session end
